# kSecValueData

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is the item’s data.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecValueData: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData].  For keys and password items, the data is secret (encrypted) and may require the user to enter a password for access.
title: kSecValueData
